summary: Completed testing of 4 NEW features: profile editing, file downloads, discussion edit/delete for members, and admin message deletion. Backend APIs working at 96.7% success rate. Frontend UI features fully functional.

flaky_endpoints.issue: Returns 500 Internal Server Error due to MongoDB ObjectId serialization issue

ui_bugs.issue: Save button occasionally blocked by modal overlay

passed_tests: Admin can delete any discussion message
Dashboard profile card shows edit button (pencil icon)
Profile edit dialog opens with current data and allows saving
Discussions page shows three-dot menu on own discussions with Edit/Delete
Discussion detail page shows three-dot menu on own messages with Edit/Delete
Project detail files tab shows download button/icon structure
Case study detail files tab shows download button/icon structure
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix chatbot ObjectId serialization issue in /api/chatbot/message endpoint. All new features are working correctly.
